patch.insert_text: - Continue atorvastatin every evening, no missed days
added_claims: Continue atorvastatin every evening with no missed days

reasons: The claim to continue atorvastatin every evening with no missed days is directly supported by the evidence span 'Let us keep the atorvastatin every evening, no missed days'.
The note never mentions atorvastatin (only simvastatin removal), so this is new, non-duplicative content.
A medication continuation directive belongs in Assessment and Plan, appropriate for the IHD/hyperlipidemia management.
